schema.description: Visibility scope for a fact. `local` and `team` scopes are never federated (except with `STIGMEM_FEDERATION_ALLOW_TEAM=true`). See spec §2.2.
schema.title: FactScope

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return only facts with HLC after this value (for event-driven polling).

parameters.name: include_contradicted
parameters.description: Include facts that have been contradicted by a newer fact.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: HLC cursor from a previous response. Omit to start from the beginning.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of facts to return per page (1–500).
